## Summary

-

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] UI/UX change
- [ ] Performance change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change. Mention device or emulator details when relevant.

-

## Screenshots or Recordings

Attach screenshots or recordings for UI changes.

## Compatibility Impact

Describe any impact on Android versions, device-specific behavior, storage, permissions,
notifications, or existing user data.

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the changed behavior locally.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, private tokens, or device-specific sensitive data.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or recordings, or this PR explains why they are not needed.
- [ ] Performance changes describe whether testing used debug, release, or benchmark builds.
- [ ] I considered whether documentation needs to be updated.
- [ ] The PR is focused and reasonably easy to review.
